name: todolist-multi-framework
description: TodoList multi-framework comparison project (React, Vue, Angular, Vanilla JS)

scripts.build:all: npm run build:react && npm run build:vue && npm run build:angular && npm run build:vanilla
scripts.install:all: cd examples/React && npm install && cd ../Vue && npm install && cd ../Angular && npm install && cd ../Vanilla && npm install

author: qingchuan73
